steps.title: Recognize the series
steps.content: The sentence lists three pieces of fault data: length, slip rate, and most recent deformation. The measurements in parentheses belong directly after the first two listed items.

steps.title: Reject faulty punctuation
steps.content: Choice B uses semicolons and stray commas for a simple series. Choice C separates labels from their measurements with unnecessary commas. Choice D runs the first two items together without needed punctuation.

steps.title: Choose simple commas
steps.content: The version with length, slip rate, and most recent deformation uses commas correctly to separate the three items in the series. The answer is A.
